data.title: Katapult Secures Tenth Waiver to Ease Loan Covenants
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Katapult Holdings ( (KPLT) ).

On April 15, 2026, Katapult Holdings, Inc. and its affiliated credit parties entered into a tenth limited waiver to their Amended and Restated Loan and Security Agreement with Midtown Madison Management LLC and other lenders. The action followed failures to maintain required minimum trailing three-month net originations as of March 31, 2026 and an increase in charged-off leases beyond agreed thresholds, underscoring ongoing performance pressures in the company’s loan collateral.

Under the new waiver, lenders permanently waived the existing default tied to these covenant breaches and any reduction to the advance rate that would have resulted from the related trigger events. This relief helps stabilize Katapult’s access to funding under the loan facility, temporarily easing covenant pressure but also highlighting continued reliance on lender flexibility as credit performance and originations remain under scrutiny.

The most recent analyst rating on (KPLT) stock is a Hold with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Katapult Holdings stock, see the KPLT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KPLT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KPLT is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial quality—negative equity and ongoing negative operating/free cash flow despite a modest return to profitability. Recent loan covenant waiver events add financing risk. Technicals are only mildly supportive (mixed trend versus the 200-day), and valuation is broadly neutral with no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on KPLT stock, click here.

More about Katapult Holdings

Katapult Holdings, Inc. operates in the financial technology and consumer leasing sector, providing lease-to-own solutions that enable consumers to acquire durable goods through alternative financing arrangements. The company typically partners with merchants to offer its lease products at the point of sale, focusing on customers who may have limited access to traditional credit options.

Average Trading Volume: 22,450

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $31.3M

data.title: Eletrobras Shareholders Approve 2025 Accounts, Dividends and New Fiscal Council at April 15 AGM
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from AXIA Energia Pfd Class B ( ($AXIA.PR) ).

At its annual general meeting held on April 15, 2026, Eletrobras shareholders approved the management report and full annual financial statements for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, as well as the proposed allocation of results and dividend distribution. Investors also endorsed the aggregate compensation for officers, directors, advisory committee members and fiscal council members for 2026, signaling broad support for the company’s governance and remuneration framework.

The meeting confirmed or elected several members of the fiscal council, including José Raimundo dos Santos, Cristina Fontes Doherty, Carlos Eduardo Teixeira Taveiros, Denilvo Morais and Gisomar Francisco de Bittencourt Marinho, while one candidate slate failed to secure enough votes. The voting outcomes consolidate the federal government’s influence in key oversight positions and set the supervisory structure that will oversee Eletrobras’s financial reporting, dividends and strategic decisions in the current fiscal year.

Spark’s Take on AXIA.PR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AXIA.PR is a Outperform.

The overall stock score of 74 reflects a strong strategic position with significant achievements in asset divestment and dividend payouts, as highlighted in the earnings call. Technical indicators show bullish momentum, though valuation concerns persist due to negative profitability. Financial performance is stable but faces challenges with profitability and revenue growth.

To see Spark’s full report on AXIA.PR stock, click here.

More about AXIA Energia Pfd Class B

Centrais Elétricas Brasileiras S.A. – Eletrobras is Brazil’s largest electric power company, operating primarily in generation and transmission across the national grid. The partially state-controlled utility plays a pivotal role in supplying electricity to the Brazilian market, with a portfolio heavily weighted toward hydroelectric assets and long-term infrastructure investments.

Average Trading Volume: 17,716

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.description:

American Resources ( (AREC) ) has shared an update.

On April 15, 2026, American Resources Corporation reshaped its boardroom, appointing corporate strategy and capital markets veteran Mark LaVerghetta, 52, as a director and member of the Nominating Committee, while long-time executive and director Thomas Sauve stepped down from the board after previously resigning as president on December 25, 2025, though he remains employed in a non-officer strategic role. At its April 15, 2026 annual meeting, shareholders elected five director nominees, including LaVerghetta, to terms running to the 2027 meeting and ratified GreenGrowth CPAs as the independent auditor for fiscal 2026, signaling continued shareholder support for the company’s governance slate and financial oversight framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (AREC) stock is a Buy with a $5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on American Resources stock, see the AREC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AREC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AREC is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (sharp revenue decline, large losses, negative equity with high debt, and ongoing cash burn). Technicals are a notable offset with the stock trading above key moving averages and positive MACD, while valuation remains neutral-to-weak given the negative P/E and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on AREC stock, click here.

More about American Resources

American Resources Corporation operates in the natural resources and infrastructure markets, focusing on the extraction, processing and reclamation of coal and related materials for industrial and energy end markets. The company positions itself as a supplier of raw materials to support infrastructure and energy needs, while emphasizing strategic acquisitions and development within its core sectors.

data.title: AMC Robotics Delays 10-K Filing Over Warrant Accounting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from AMC Robotics Corporation ( (AMCI) ).

On April 15, 2026, AMC Robotics Corporation announced it would miss the SEC’s April 15 deadline for filing its Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2025. The company attributed the delay to additional work required to finalize U.S. GAAP accounting treatment and disclosure for warrants issued in a private financing tied to its business combination with AlphaVest Acquisition Corp.

AMC Robotics emphasized that the issue is a technical accounting matter relating to the classification of those warrants and does not indicate any change in its underlying business operations or financial performance. The disclosure aims to reassure investors that the delay stems from post-merger financial reporting complexities rather than operational weakness or a deterioration in the company’s AI robotics business.

More about AMC Robotics Corporation

AMC Robotics Corporation is an AI-driven robotics company that develops intelligent, scalable hardware and software solutions for industrial automation. Its flagship quadruped robotic platform, Kyro, targets inspection, security, and operational tasks across various industries through autonomous mobility and AI-powered perception, positioning the firm within the advanced robotics and automation market.

Average Trading Volume: 99,210

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $147.8M

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. Class A ( (TSE:BAM) ) has shared an update.

On April 14, 2026, Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. entered into an underwriting agreement with RBC Capital Markets and SMBC Nikko Securities America for a US$1 billion debt offering comprising US$550 million of new 4.832% senior notes due 2031 and a US$450 million re-opening of its 5.298% senior notes due 2036. The notes, issued under existing indentures and offered via a cross-border shelf prospectus structure in Canada and a Form F-10 registration in the United States, are expected to close on April 17, 2026, further bolstering Brookfield’s access to long-term financing and reinforcing its position as a well-known seasoned issuer in North American capital markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BAM) stock is a Hold with a C$48.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. Class A stock, see the TSE:BAM Stock Forecast page.

Bartronics India Limited ( (IN:ASMS) ) has shared an announcement.

Avio Smart Market Stack Limited has notified the stock exchanges that it has obtained the mandatory quarterly certificate from its registrar and share transfer agent, Bigshare Services Private Limited, as required under Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018 for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. Cipla Ltd ( (IN:CIPLA) ) has shared an announcement.

Cipla has notified stock exchanges that it has published newspaper advertisements supporting the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority’s Second 100-Day Campaign, ‘Saksham Niveshak’. The campaign targets the company’s shareholders to help them regularize pending dividend claims and complete KYC updates, with details also made available on Cipla’s website, reinforcing its compliance and investor-servicing practices.

By participating in the ‘Saksham Niveshak’ initiative and formally alerting investors through national and regional newspapers, Cipla is aiming to improve shareholder awareness and reduce unclaimed dividends. The move underscores the company’s alignment with regulatory priorities under SEBI’s disclosure norms and may enhance trust and transparency for its investor base.

More about Cipla Ltd

Cipla Ltd is a leading Indian pharmaceutical company headquartered in Mumbai, operating in the global generics and branded medicines market. The company focuses on respiratory, anti-infective, cardiovascular and other therapeutic segments, supplying drugs to both domestic and international markets and maintaining listings in India and Luxembourg.

data.title: Fosun’s Yuyuan Posts Strong Q1 Profit Rebound but Cash Flow Turns Negative
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Fosun International ( (HK:0656) ) has issued an announcement.

Fosun International has highlighted the first-quarter 2026 performance of its Shanghai-listed subsidiary Yuyuan, which reported revenue of RMB 9.65 billion, up 9.87% year on year. Net profit attributable to shareholders surged more than threefold to RMB 156.97 million, with core profit excluding non-recurring items swinging from a loss to a profit, indicating a marked improvement in operating performance.

Despite stronger earnings, Yuyuan’s net cash flow from operating activities fell into negative territory at RMB -485.55 million, compared with a positive RMB 317.78 million a year earlier, while total assets and shareholder equity edged down slightly versus year-end 2025. The figures suggest that while profitability is recovering, cash generation and balance-sheet trends will be key areas for investors to monitor in assessing the sustainability of the turnaround.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0656) stock is a Buy with a HK$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fosun International stock, see the HK:0656 Stock Forecast page.

More about Fosun International

Fosun International Limited is a diversified investment and holding company with significant operations in China, spanning sectors such as consumer and tourism. Its subsidiary Shanghai Yuyuan Tourist Mart (Group) Co., Ltd., listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange, operates in retail and related consumer businesses, serving domestic Chinese markets through its broad commercial footprint.

Average Trading Volume: 26,006,075

Current Market Cap: HK$33.21B

data.title: Flutter Cancels New Tranche of Shares Under Multi-Billion Buyback Plan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Flutter Entertainment PLC ( (FLUT) ) has issued an announcement.

Flutter Entertainment plc has redeemed and cancelled 66,869 of its ordinary shares in the U.S. market on April 15 via broker Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC, at a volume-weighted average price of $111.49. Following this latest tranche of buybacks, the group will have 174,039,580 ordinary shares in issue, modestly enhancing earnings per share and capital returns for investors.

The transaction is part of Flutter’s ongoing $250 million 10-week buyback launched in March 2026, itself a component of a wider plan to repurchase up to $5 billion of shares announced in 2024. The continued execution of this programme underscores management’s confidence in the company’s valuation and balance sheet strength, while also tightening the free float and potentially supporting the share price over time.

More about Flutter Entertainment PLC

Flutter Entertainment plc is a global sports betting and online gaming group whose brands span online sportsbooks, casino, poker and daily fantasy sports. The company focuses on regulated markets, with a growing presence in the U.S. and other key jurisdictions, and competes as one of the largest operators in the digital gambling industry worldwide.
